Notes on Site Locations: Upstream point, in West Fork Trinity, relative to the Naval Air Station Joint Reserve Base
50–300 m upstream of the Farmers Branch (from Southwest) confluence with the West Fork. It feeds into West Fork Trinity downstream of TW09 and upstream of TW92.
West Fork immediately downstream of Farmers confluence (TW91 and TW09) but upstream of the NAS JRB influence reach (TW08)
Bracket_role: Post-tributary / pre-source (WF Trinity, upstream of NAS reach)

Notes on Site Locations: Downstream of the Naval Air Station Joint Reserve Base
Bracket_role: Downstream of source reach (WF Trinity, downstream of NAS) + USGS gage

Notes on Site Locations: Tributary from northwest to West Fork Trinity downstream of TW08 and upstream of TW82.
Bracket_role: Tributary end-member (NW tributary to WF Trinity)

Notes on Site Locations: Downstream of TW08 and after TW81 feeds into the West Fork Trinity before it merges to Clear Fork Trinity
Bracket_role: Downstream integrator (WF Trinity after TW81; before CF confluence)

Bracket_role: Confluence integrator (WF + CF near Main St) + USGS gage

Notes on Site Locations: Upstream of Holly Water Treatment Plant and TW71
Bracket_role: Upstream baseline (Clear Fork Trinity) + USGS gage

Notes on Site Locations: Clear Fork immediately upstream of Holly WTP discharge influence; downstream of TW07.
Bracket_role: Pre-source (Clear Fork just upstream of Holly WTP discharge influence)

Notes on Site Locations: Downstream of TW07 before it merges to West Fork Trinity River
Upstream point relative to Fort Worth Meacham Airport. It is in Marine Creek.
Bracket_role: Upstream baseline (Marine Creek, upstream of airport)

Notes on Site Locations: Creek that drains Mecham Airport and feeds into the Marine Creek at the NW 35th st; it is downstream of TW25.
Marine Creek downstream of Meacham Airport before it merges to West Fork Trinity. It is downstream of TW25 and TW251.
Bracket_role: Downstream integrator (Marine Creek downstream of airport; pre-confluence)

Notes on Site Locations: Downstream from the confluence of West Fork Trinity, Clear Fork Trinity, and Marine Creek. It is below all sites but TW41.
The last sampling location, which drains all 14 sampling sites. It is below TW06.
